sql:
WITH LapDurations AS (
    SELECT
        t.driver_number,
        t.lap_number,
        MAX(t.lap_time_sec) AS lap_time_sec
    FROM
        f1_data_library_DS.telemetry AS t
    WHERE
        t.season = 2026
        AND t.event_name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
        AND t.session_type = 'R'
    GROUP BY
        t.driver_number, t.lap_number
)
SELECT
    pd.full_name,
    ld.lap_number,
    FORMAT("%02d:%02d.%03d",
        CAST(FLOOR(ld.lap_time_sec / 60) AS INT64),
        CAST(FLOOR(MOD(CAST(ld.lap_time_sec AS NUMERIC), 60)) AS INT64),
        CAST(MOD(CAST(ld.lap_time_sec * 1000 AS INT64), 1000) AS INT64)
    ) AS formatted_lap_time
FROM
    LapDurations AS ld
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_drivers AS pd
    ON TRIM(CAST(ld.driver_number AS STRING)) = TRIM(CAST(pd.driver_number AS STRING))
ORDER BY
    ld.lap_time_sec ASC
LIMIT 5
